events.summary: Mrs. Bennet tells Mr. Bennet that Netherfield Park has been rented by a wealthy single man named Bingley
Mrs. Bennet urges Mr. Bennet to visit Bingley so their daughters might marry him

traps.name: Mrs. Long
traps.reason: Only mentioned as the source of gossip; not a participant in any scene

traps.name: Lizzy
traps.reason: Referenced in dialogue but does not appear or act in this chapter

traps.name: Sir William Lucas
traps.reason: Mentioned as planning to visit Bingley but does not appear in the chapter
